steps.title: Focus on size
steps.content: The student's goal is to emphasize Tepozalan's size. The only note that gives a size measurement says Tepozalan covers roughly 63 square kilometers, so the correct choice must include that area.

steps.title: Reject unrelated details
steps.content: Choice A discusses municipal services. Choice B says Tepozalan is one of 84 municipalities in Hidalgo. Choice C describes Tepozalan's governmental role and services. None of those states the municipality's area. The answer is D.
